text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "svchost.exe is interacting with an unusual and non-standard registry key HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\VFUProvider, repeatedly creating and setting its StartTime value. This is not typical behavior for a standard Windows service hosted by svchost.exe.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\VFUProvider",
    "reg_create",
    "reg_set",
    "repeated activity"
  ]
}
